## Which problem does this solve?

<!-- Link the issue. A PR without a stated problem is a solution looking for one. -->

## Which test proves it?

<!-- Point at the test(s) shipped with this change — every behavioural change ships with one. -->

## Which ADR/RFC, if this takes a decision?

<!-- If this change takes a non-trivial decision, add the ADR in this PR (docs/adr/).
     Write "none" if it doesn't. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` is green locally (typecheck · lint · boundaries · tests)
- [ ] The PR title is a Conventional Commit (it becomes the squash-merge commit)
- [ ] Changeset added if user-visible — when applicable (changesets tooling arrives with the
      first release)
